title: Authorities in Fujairah respond to incident targeting 'du' building by drone from Iran
summary: The Fujairah Media Office stated that no injuries have been reported
thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.
contentHtml:
FUJAIRAH - The competent authorities in Fujairah announced that they are responding to an incident resulting from the targeting of a du telecommunications building in the emirate by a drone launched from Iran.

The Fujairah Media Office stated that no injuries have been reported.

Article Source: Emirates News Agency (WAM)
